hero.subtitle: Hi, I'm Samuel Rumbo. Welcome to my personal portfolio, where you can get to know me a little better.

about.label: About me
about.paragraph1: My path into programming started in a much more indirect way than most: I went from being a carpenter to discovering my passion for development and making a radical shift in my career.
about.paragraph2: The skills I learned as a carpenter - attention to detail, precision and patience - are the same ones I apply when coding.
about.paragraph3: If I'm not writing code, you'll probably find me exploring new technologies, doing sports, playing video games or enjoying a good book. I'm always looking to learn and grow as a developer and as a person.
about.quote: My goal is to create digital experiences that are not only functional, but also appealing, easy to use and valuable to users.

highlights.title: Clean Code
highlights.description: Writing clean, maintainable code that follows industry best practices.

highlights.title: Performance Optimization
highlights.description: Optimizing for speed and delivering blazing-fast user experiences.

highlights.title: Teamwork
highlights.description: Working closely with teams to bring ideas to life.

highlights.title: Innovation
highlights.description: Staying up to date with the latest technologies and best practices.

items.title: Techno & EDM Festival
items.description: Project for an electronic music festival, with a modern and appealing design, built with HTML5, CSS3 and JavaScript.

experience.label: Resume
experience.subtitle: My professional growth has been a journey full of diverse experiences, from carpentry to software development. Each stage has contributed to my overall development, allowing me to gain the technical and soft skills that have prepared me to face challenges in today's job market.

items.description: REST API developer building a Spring Boot API from scratch to manage R&D tax incentive programs, leveraging AI agents to optimize results.
Developed a REST API in Spring Boot from scratch, including the design and creation of the PostgreSQL database.
Testing and improving the company's application. Extended and fixed API functionality and implemented advanced controls with database operations.
Vocational training program where we learn to become full-stack developers using different languages and frameworks such as Spring Boot, .NET, Django, Laravel or React.

items.company: Meimersdorf Schule / Schule am Heidenberger Teich
items.description: Provided educational support and guidance to students in various school settings.
Specialized in custom carpentry, installation and construction project management, with a focus on quality craftsmanship.
German vocational training program specialized in carpentry and woodworking, the starting point of the journey that would later lead me to software development.

contact.label: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: If you have a project in mind, I'd love to help you make it a reality. Feel free to reach out to discuss your ideas and how we can work together to bring them to life.
